patch.comment: Patch release after npm E409 conflict resolution.
patch.author: Helmuth Saatkamp <helmuthdu@gmail.com>

patch.comment: Patch release after version normalization to major 3.
patch.author: Helmuth Saatkamp <helmuthdu@gmail.com>

patch.comment: Dummy patch release to republish after npm token incident.
patch.author: Helmuth Saatkamp <helmuthdu@gmail.com>

major.comment: Release a new major version with DI container refactors, lifecycle and resolution improvements, and breaking API streamlining.
major.author: Helmuth Saatkamp <helmuthdu@gmail.com>

major.comment: Major release: zero-dependency IoC container with typed tokens via createToken<T>(description); three registration styles — value(), factory(), and bind() — plus low-level register(); singleton, transient, and scoped lifetimes; async provider support with getAsync() / getAllAsync() and concurrent singleton deduplication; per-provider dispose hooks called on container.dispose(); child containers via createChild() with scoped lifetime isolation; runInScope() for auto-disposed request scopes; alias() for interface-to-implementation mapping with cycle detection; batch resolution via getAll() / getAllAsync() with typed tuple returns; getOptional() / getOptionalAsync() for safe resolution; mock(), snapshot(), restore() test helpers; createTestContainer() returning { container, dispose }; debug() for full hierarchy introspection; [Symbol.asyncDispose] support
major.author: Helmuth Saatkamp <helmuthdu@gmail.com>
